Package com.cake.struts.internal.microliner

Interface MicrolinerOutline

All Known Implementing Classes:
MicrolinerAABBOutline, MicrolinerLineOutline
public interface MicrolinerOutline
"This code is modified and used under MIT licence, full credit goes to the Create / Ponder team."

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    render(com.mojang.blaze3d.vertex.PoseStack poseStack, net.minecraft.client.renderer.MultiBufferSource buffer, net.minecraft.world.phys.Vec3 camera, MicrolinerParams params)
     
    static void
    renderLine(com.mojang.blaze3d.vertex.PoseStack poseStack, com.mojang.blaze3d.vertex.VertexConsumer consumer, net.minecraft.world.phys.Vec3 frompos, net.minecraft.world.phys.Vec3 toPos, float r, float g, float b, float a)
    Equivalent to LevelRenderer.renderLineBox(VertexConsumer, double, double, double, double, double, double, float, float, float, float) for just a line.

    • render

      static void renderLine(com.mojang.blaze3d.vertex.PoseStack poseStack, com.mojang.blaze3d.vertex.VertexConsumer consumer, net.minecraft.world.phys.Vec3 frompos, net.minecraft.world.phys.Vec3 toPos, float r, float g, float b, float a)
      Equivalent to LevelRenderer.renderLineBox(VertexConsumer, double, double, double, double, double, double, float, float, float, float) for just a line.
